moreAboutCandies.title:
Want to know more
about candies?

faqs.question: How many candies can you eat?
faqs.answer:
From half a candy per day, for example during a course. Up to a few pieces, for improving mood, reducing anxiety, and improving sleep.

Although CBD is safe, we still recommend no more than 3 candies per day.

faqs.question: Is it legal?
faqs.answer:
Yes. In 2021, the government allowed the import of cannabidiol (CBD) isolate into Ukraine.

Since CBD has no psychoactive (narcotic) effects, it was removed from the list of prohibited substances.

faqs.question: Is it safe?
faqs.answer:
Yes. This is confirmed by research results in many countries.

Although no side effects have been found from using CBD, it is recommended to consult a doctor, especially if you have medical conditions or are taking other medications.

faqs.question: When is the best time to take CBD?
faqs.answer:
For better sleep — 30 minutes before bedtime.
At the end of the workday to relieve stress and tension.
Take in courses to balance your internal state.
To reduce anxiety and panic attacks.
For relaxation during massages, tattooing, etc.

faqs.question: When is it better not to use?
faqs.answer:
We recommend consulting a doctor regarding the use of CBD, especially if:

• you are pregnant or breastfeeding
• before surgery (CBD may affect blood clotting)
• you have medical conditions or are taking other medications

CBD relaxes and reduces focus, so it is not recommended to use it before driving or working on tasks that require concentration.

meta.title: CBD Rabbit

accordeon.title: Storage
accordeon.text: Store in a dry place from 4° to 20°C and relative air humidity no more than 75%. Shelf life: 10 months from the date of manufacture
